content.en:
"Look for death!"

Darklin said angrily.

A mere Ninefold Dao Realm dared to snatch the blood of the strongest legend, and he had to be killed.

However.

After a fight, Darklin found that he was not an opponent.

Rumble!

He was shocked by Ye Tian, although he was not injured, but it undoubtedly proved that his strength was not as good as Ye Tian.

"The third sequence of the Ten Percent Realm Supreme Dao Rules, how is this possible, when did the Innate Origin Domain Alliance have such a demonic Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm?"

And at this time.

Ye Tian had already caught the Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape, and the third sequence of Supreme Dao rules turned into a prison to seal it up, directly erasing its last vitality.

"Let's go!"

Two replicas open the way, allowing the third replica to leave.

Although there were a lot of these Supreme Dao Void Demons, Ye Tian's strength was undoubtedly too strong, and he resisted their attacks and killed many Supreme Dao Void Demons.

Ye Tian didn't think about killing them all, if he sacrificed a replica body, he could really kill them.

But in that case, he wouldn't have to think about it.

So.

He still chose to go directly!

......

The other side.

More than a hundred Supreme Dao Void Demons were about to lose their hold, and when they saw that the other Supreme Dao Void Demons still couldn't come, they fled directly.

Click!!

The formation was broken by the eight-winged golden cicada.

Immediately, the eight-winged golden cicada began to flee.

But at this time, Ye Tian's other two replica bodies descended and attacked the eight-winged golden cicada.

The eight-winged golden cicada itself was seriously injured, and under Ye Tian's desperate fighting, the eight-winged golden cicada's injuries became more and more serious.

Ultimately.

The eight-winged golden cicada was killed by Ye Tian.

"Let's go!"

He put away the corpse of the eight-winged golden cicada, left directly, and returned to the legendary ancient city.

And the dark lin they arrived here, it was already late.

Two legendary creatures with the blood of the strongest legend were snatched away in a row, and the Darklin was furious.

The point is, they didn't get any benefits, but instead fell a lot of Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demons.

"Kill some legendary creatures and go back!"

Darklin said.

They can't just go back without any gain, right?

......

Legend of the ancient city.

Ye Tian had returned, and the other Nine Realms had already known about it.

After all, they were also paying attention to the battle between the Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape and the Eight-Winged Golden Cicada, but those Supreme Dao Void Demons were too powerful, and they couldn't resist it, so they didn't dare to make a move.

Unexpectedly, Ye Tian actually made a move, and he also successfully snatched two copies of the blood of the strongest legend.

As a result, a number of Nine Noble Dao Realms who had taken the path of the Supreme Strength to the Dao came to Ye Tian and wanted to buy a copy of the Blood of the Supreme Legend.

However, Ye Tian's words made them shut up.

"You can't afford this price!"

Ye Tian said.

These Ninefold Dao Realms did not refute, they really couldn't afford this price.

Winter Night's Fortress.

Ye Tian received visits from many family forces, and in the end, Ye Tian chose the Su tribe who was more familiar with him.

After all, he and Su Ya know each other and have a very good relationship.

If the Sioux could afford the price, he could sell a copy of the Blood of the Mighty Legend.

What Ye Tian didn't expect was that the person who visited this time turned out to be a veteran of the Soviet Clan.

"I've seen Elder Su!"

Ye Tian looked at Su Yuan in front of him and said respectfully.

This is a veteran-level powerhouse, the top existence of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, and his strength is extremely terrifying.

"Ye Tian, I want to buy a copy of the blood of the strongest legend in your hand!"

Su Yuan directly expressed his intentions.

Ye Tian nodded slightly: "Yes, but I want to buy second-order Supreme Dao rule items, and there is no restriction on quality." "

"Second Sequence Supreme Dao Rule Items, is it okay to be low-quality?" asked Su Yuan.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Su Yuan was silent for a long time before he said, "I can take out two low-quality second-order supreme rule items, after all, second-order supreme rule items are too rare, even low-quality second-order supreme rule items are not easy to find." Although the blood of the strongest legends is rare, it is not unique to the world of legends. If it weren't for the fact that the Legend Realm didn't allow Legend to enter the Dao Realm, it wouldn't be difficult to kill a powerful Legendary-level creature. "

"Okay, I agree!"

Ye Tian was very crisp.

Originally, he only wanted to exchange for one low-quality second-order supreme rule item, but Su Yuan was willing to take out two second-order supreme rule items, what reason did he have for not agreeing?

"However, I still want to add one more condition!"

Ye Tian said.

Su Yuan frowned slightly, but still asked, "What conditions do you want?"

"I hope that the Sioux can send a strong man second only to the patriarch to garrison the Winter Night Fortress!" Ye Tian said.

"That's the condition!"

Su Yuan smiled slightly.

He also thought that Ye Tian wanted the lion to open his mouth wide and make some excessive conditions, and the result was this.

"In this way, how about I send the top legend in the Sioux clan to the Dao realm, Soho, to garrison here in the 100 million Dao Era?"

"Okay, thank you Elder Su!"

Ye Tian hurriedly said.

With his growth rate, after 100 million Dao Era, he would already be a legend to the Dao Realm.

The reason why he asked Su Yuan to send strong men to garrison the Winter Night Fortress was also because he had killed a lot of Supreme Dao Void Demons this time, for fear that the Supreme Dao Void Demon side would send top powerhouses to break through the Winter Night Fortress and destroy the Infinite Domain where he was located.

In that case, even if he can't die, there are other replicas that survive, but his family can't.

Therefore, he must put an end to this danger.

If he couldn't recruit the strong to guard it, he would have to transfer some of the human beings and scatter them in the Innate Origin Domain.

But now, the Sioux are willing to send strong men to guard it, and he is not afraid.

Soon.

Ye Tian and Su Yuan completed the transaction, and two second-order supreme Dao rule items were delivered to him.

And Su Ho of the Sioux tribe also came to the Winter Night Fortress, but unless there is a legend to the Dao realm attack, she will not make a move, this is the rule.

Soon after.

When the news came out, Ye Tian completed the deal with the Sioux people, and the other forces gave up, and they all envied the Sioux people.

After all, if there is no doubt about it, the Sioux clan will soon give birth to a legendary Dao realm that takes the path of the strongest to the Dao, and its strength will be improved by a bit.

......

Mogu is in the line.

The Dark Blood Demon Venerable was very annoyed, and got information about Ye Tian.

"Ye Tian, he has a lot of clones, it's hard to kill! Hmph, if you can't kill him, then destroy his clan, maybe the body is inside the clan. The Dark Blood Demon Venerable thought to himself.

He couldn't do it, his whereabouts had long been watched by the elders of the Innate Origin Alliance, and if he went to the side of the Innate Origin Alliance, he would inevitably be besieged by a group of Patriarchs.

When the time comes, he will have to die!

Thereupon.

He summoned the Star Demon Lord!
